business_objects.name: ProductManager
business_objects.description: An entity representing a Product Manager role responsible for defining product vision and strategy.

business_objects.name: SoftwareEngineer
business_objects.description: An entity representing a Software Engineer role specializing in developing software applications.

business_objects.name: CybersecuritySpecialist
business_objects.description: An entity representing a Cybersecurity Specialist role focusing on securing computer systems and networks.

business_objects.name: DataScientist
business_objects.description: An entity representing a Data Scientist role analyzing data to inform business decisions.

business_objects.name: FullStackDeveloper
business_objects.description: An entity representing a Full Stack Developer role responsible for developing both frontend and backend of software applications.

business_objects.name: DevOpsEngineer
business_objects.description: An entity representing a DevOps Engineer role automating the build, test, and deployment of software applications.

conventions.naming_convention: UPPER_SNAKE for relationships, PascalCase for objects.
conventions.normalization_convention: Strict normalization rules apply. Similar references will be definitively aligned (e.g., 'AngularJS' vs 'Angular' -> 'Angular', 'JS' vs 'JavaScript' -> 'JavaScript').
